channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Node.js memory leak: how to find it in 10 min
item.description: Cut Node.js memory usage 70% by fixing the 3 real leaks: closures, unclosed streams, and CPU throttling. Use process.memoryUsage().external, heap diffs, and clinic.js to find it in minutes.

item.title: We wasted 6 months over-engineering
item.description: Cut dashboard latency from 1.2s to 85ms and cloud costs from $1,800 to $350 — the real cost of over-engineering an analytics dashboard we didn’t need

item.title: 9 AI tools that cost more work than they save
item.description: Cut rework time 30% with these 9 AI tools — real benchmarks, rework rates, and the $12k mistake we made measuring the wrong thing

item.title: TypeScript strict mode traps you still hit
item.description: Cut TypeScript runtime errors 40% with strict mode traps — compare zod vs io-ts on latency, DX, and infra cost using real benchmarks and failure scenarios you’ll hit in production.

item.title: AI reads your repo: what it sees, what it misses
item.description: Cut AI-assisted code review time by 60% with repository intelligence — 200 ms queries, 92% first-try fix rate, and the open-source stack that makes it real.

item.title: Junior devs after GitHub Copilot
item.description: Ship 2.3x faster with GitHub Copilot without cargo-culting — latency drops from 240ms to 18ms, cache hit ratio jumps from 42% to 78%, and incidents fall 67% with this repeatable junior onboarding stack.

item.title: 5 ways to add real-time without WebSockets
item.description: Cut infra cost 75% and latency 60% by replacing WebSockets with Redis Streams polling — concrete benchmarks and code for 5 real-time alternatives

item.title: 2026 tech salaries will crash — here’s the math
item.description: Cut real tech salaries by 18% in 2026: how legacy systems and AI tools erode compensation — leverage, ownership, and the data from 47 companies

item.title: Agentic AI steals your hours
item.description: Cut 70% dev time with agentic AI — here’s where it actually saves hours and where it wastes them with benchmarks, guardrails, and concrete examples from Brazil, Colombia, and Mexico deployments.

item.title: Get paid $120k for remote work from a $2k/mo country
item.description: Get paid $120k remotely from a $2k country — the exact scripts, spreadsheets, and contracts that worked in Kenya, Colombia, and Mexico. Includes real contracts, currency hacks, and a 3-email cold pitch that gets replies.

item.title: Edge functions in 2026 are cheaper than a coffee but only useful in 3 cases
item.description: Cut API response time by 43% for SE Asia users with Cloudflare Workers, but added 34ms in the US — real latency, cost, and failure data from a live global API in 2026. edge functions when Cloudflare Workers and Vercel Edge actually make sense

item.title: 13 AI Coding Tools Ranked by Real Trust (Not Just Downloads)
item.description: Cut rework time by 62% with the right AI coding tool — ranked list from 29% trustworthy tools, benchmarks, and the $87 mistake that changed my mind

item.title: Why my 3am AI prototypes died at 9am in production
item.description: Cut production latency by 78% and connection leaks to zero after replacing vibe-coded endpoints with hand-crafted asyncpg pools — here’s the exact migration cost and tooling that worked

item.title: Feeling empty at 2pm every day? The burnout loop freelancers miss
item.description: Freelance developers cut daily focus time from 1h42m to 4h45m by capping active projects at 3, logging emotional debt, and auditing their environment. Verified with RescueTime, Oura Ring, and Linear API data.

item.title: The $100/month AI coding budget finally explained
item.description: Cut debugging time by 30% with a $100/month AI coding budget — real latency figures, rework costs, and the tools that actually worked in Nigeria and Ghana. AI coding budget explained for indie devs.

item.title: MCP servers exposed: the invisible layer 99% of devs miss
item.description: MCP servers exposed invisible: e result? 100% of subsequent calls failed wi. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: 13 AI code security risks teams miss right now
item.description: Fix 13 AI code security risks before they hit production — 400ms latency spikes, 12% token failures, and 2,000 PII leaks uncovered in real multi-region stacks. Audit AI-generated code for timezone-naive datetime, integer overflow, SQL injection via ORM, Redis cache stampedes, and more.

item.title: Why my AWS bill dropped 40% overnight (and how you can too)
item.description: Cut AWS compute costs by 40% with Graviton ARM instances and Spot Instances — real benchmarks, Terraform code, and the interruptions I didn’t see coming.

item.title: AI-first systems fail without this backend pattern
item.description: Cut API latency to 180ms and LLM costs by 62% with this backend pattern — FastAPI, Redis, RQ, and vector cache. Real code, benchmarks, and failure modes you won’t find in docs.

item.title: Your AI code tool writes bad tests (and how to fix it)
item.description: Catch 67% more bugs by replacing AI-generated weak tests with strong behavioral ones — real metrics from 12 services, mutation scores, and CI pipeline fixes.
